title: Under the Influence
relevance_summary: Influencers coordinating NFT purchases through private calls and subsequent price manipulation
funds_lost: Not explicitly stated, but implied through significant price drops

prevention.rule: Block any transaction involving NFT purchases from a large number of coordinated wallets within a short timeframe.
prevention.trigger: NFT_PURCHASE -> multiple wallets within a short timeframe

red_flags: Private calls involving multiple influencers discussing NFT purchases
Sudden and coordinated price increases followed by drops
vulnerable_contracts: NFT contracts involved in the purchases
monitoring_rules: Monitor for multiple wallets making NFT purchases in a short timeframe
summary: Influencers coordinated NFT purchases through private calls, leading to price manipulation and significant losses for other investors. A guard could have detected this by blocking transactions involving multiple coordinated wallets purchasing NFTs within a short period.
